channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Target recalls over 200,000 children's sandals due to choking hazard
item.description: Target reported 23 incidents of the sandal's pearls detaching from the shoe.

item.title: WATCH: Inside Fanatics Fest and the booming sports card industry
item.description: ABC News' Perry Russom reports from Fanatics Fest in NYC on how sports cards, once seen as a childish pastime, are now valued at nearly...

item.title: Appeals court grants Trump temporary victory in mail-in voting dispute
item.description: A federal appeals court in Washington, D.C., gave the Trump administration a temporary win on Friday in its push to expand federal oversight of...

item.title: Iran live updates: Iran claims US violated MOU, says it is suspending commitments
item.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, involving large-scale joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.
